content: controller-runtime auto-exposes reconcile metrics, workqueue depth/retries, REST client rate/429s, leader-election status, and webhook latency via sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/metrics.Registry (Prometheus). Best-signal set: reconcile error rate, reconcile latency, workqueue depth, API throttling, leader status. Custom business metrics (e.g. ready/failed resource counts, external dependency latency) should be added the same way. Labels should stay bounded (controller, namespace, kind, result, reason) — never label by CR name/UID (cardinality explosion). Use Kubernetes Events (Recorder) for per-object human-readable detail (e.g. Conflict, RolloutStarted) — Events complement, don't replace, metrics.
